info.title: F1 Insight API
info.description:
## F1 Insight API

A comprehensive Formula 1 historical data analysis API covering **every season from 1950 to 2024**.

### Features

- **CRUD Operations** - Manage drivers, constructors, and circuits with full pagination, filtering, and sorting
- **Career Analytics** - Lifetime stats, season progression curves, head-to-head driver comparisons
- **Strategy Analysis** - Pit stop strategies, circuit history, performance trends
- **Advanced Models** - Win probability prediction, multi-dimensional performance ratings, teammate battles, leaderboards

### Authentication

Protected endpoints require a JWT Bearer token. Register via `POST /api/v1/auth/register`, then login via `POST /api/v1/auth/login` to receive your token.

### Data Source

[Ergast F1 Dataset](http://ergast.com/mrd/) - 10 tables, 26,000+ race results, 850+ drivers.

post.description: Register a new user account. Username and email must be unique.
Login with username and password to receive a JWT access token. Use the token as `Bearer <token>` in the Authorization header.

get.description: Get a paginated list of drivers with optional filters and smart sorting.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by name, surname, or driver_ref
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by name, surname, or driver_ref

parameters.name: sort_by

schema.description: Sort by: 'newest', 'oldest', 'popularity' (all-time points), 'recent' (latest season points), 'wins' (total wins)
schema.title: Sort By

parameters.description: Sort by: 'newest', 'oldest', 'popularity' (all-time points), 'recent' (latest season points), 'wins' (total wins)

schema.title: Response Get Drivers Api V1 Drivers  Get

get.description: Get a single driver by ID.

409.description: Cannot delete: associated race results exist

example.detail: Cannot delete driver: 150 race results are associated. Remove associated results first.

get.description:
Get comprehensive career statistics for a driver.

Includes total races, wins, podiums, poles, points, DNFs, win/podium rates,
teams driven for, and active seasons.

404.description: Driver not found or no race data

get.description:
Get a driver's points accumulation across a season.
Returns round-by-round cumulative points for charting progression curves.

404.description: Driver not found or no data for season

example.detail: No data for this driver in the specified season

get.description:
Head-to-head comparison between two drivers.
Compares wins, points, podiums, and direct race encounters.

404.description: One or both drivers not found

example.detail: One or both drivers not found

get.description:
Analyse pit stop strategies and their impact on race results for a given race.

Shows per-driver stop count, total pit time, and strategy summary with
average finishing position by number of stops.

404.description: Race not found or no pit stop data

example.detail: No pit stop data available for this race

get.description:
Get historical statistics for a circuit.

Includes total races held, first/last race year, and top 5 most successful
drivers by wins at this circuit.

404.description: No races found for this circuit

example.detail: No races found for this circuit

get.description:
Predict a driver's win probability at a specific circuit based on historical data.

Combines multiple factors:
- Historical win rate at this circuit
- Recent form (last 5 races overall)
- Circuit-specific finishing positions
- Grid-to-finish conversion rate

Returns a probability score (0-100%) with breakdown of contributing factors.

Generate a comprehensive multi-dimensional performance summary for a driver.

Analyses qualifying pace, race pace, consistency, overtaking ability,
and pit stop efficiency to produce an overall rating out of 100.

404.description: Driver not found or no data

example.detail: No data found for this driver

get.description:
Head-to-head comparison between a driver and their teammate(s) in a specific season.

Compares qualifying positions, race results, and points scored
in races where both drivers participated.

404.description: Driver not found or no data for season

example.detail: No data for this driver in 2024

get.description:
Dynamic leaderboard that ranks drivers by various metrics.

Supports filtering by season and ranking by total points, wins, podiums, or win rate.
Get a paginated list of circuits with optional filters and sorting.

schema.title: Response Get Circuits Api V1 Circuits  Get

get.summary: Get circuit detail with race history
get.description:
Get a single circuit by ID with recent race history.

Returns circuit details plus the 5 most recent races held at this circuit,
including the winner of each race.

example.detail: Cannot delete circuit: 59 races are associated with it. Remove associated races first.

get.summary: Get constructor detail with career summary
get.description:
Get a single constructor by ID with career summary and notable drivers.

Returns constructor details plus all-time stats (total races, wins, points)
and the top 5 highest-scoring drivers who raced for this team.

example.detail: Cannot delete constructor: 268 race results are associated with it. Remove associated results first.

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration and JWT-based login. Register an account and login to receive a Bearer token for protected endpoints.

tags.name: Drivers
tags.description: CRUD operations for F1 drivers. Supports pagination, nationality filter, name search, and sorting by newest/oldest/popularity/recent/wins. POST/PUT require authentication; DELETE requires admin.

tags.name: Circuits
tags.description: CRUD operations for F1 circuits. List includes total races per circuit. Detail view shows the 5 most recent race winners. POST/PUT require authentication; DELETE requires admin.

tags.name: Constructors
tags.description: CRUD operations for F1 constructors (teams). List includes total points and wins. Detail view shows career summary and top 5 drivers. POST/PUT require authentication; DELETE requires admin.

tags.name: Analytics
tags.description: Core F1 data analysis: career stats, season progression curves, head-to-head driver comparisons, pit stop strategy analysis, and circuit historical records. All computed from raw race data (no pre-aggregated tables).

tags.name: Advanced Analytics
tags.description: Advanced analytical models: win probability prediction (4-factor weighted model), multi-dimensional performance ratings (0-100), teammate head-to-head battle comparisons, and dynamic leaderboards by various metrics.
